title: rosa × dumetorum f. deseglisei
intro: Rosa × dumetorum f. deseglisei, also known as the Rosa × dumetorum subsp. deseglisei, is a variety of wild rose that belongs to the family Rosaceae. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum f. deseglisei include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
